title: Eine Frau, die weiß, was sie will
writer: Peter Franke, Alfred Grünwald, Ernst Hasselbach
actors: Lil Dagover, Anton Edthofer, Maria Beling
plot: A South American businessman's daughter follows for a while in her mother's footsteps and abandons marriage and a family for a stage career.But then she decides to do what her father wants and raise a good German household.
